response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack engineer with ~15 years of broad experience across web, embedded, and data-integration systems, but the role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud strategy influence. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work started in April 2025, with no track record of leading AI strategy, advising strategic customers, or shipping AI platforms at scale. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) is also a tier below Principal/Director IC.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Active community contributor — workshops, talks, open-source GIS platform, and test tooling in D
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Lacks Director/Principal-level scope — no evidence of cross-org technical strategy or executive-level customer advisory
No cloud platform strategy depth or entrepreneurial-within-large-org experience

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks
